description: An ENT surgeon needs a 3D model of the patient's frontal sinus for surgical planning from the loaded CT Cranium DICOM scan. Segment the frontal sinus air cavity (the paired air pockets located in the forehead bone, superior to the orbits/eyes) and export the resulting 3D surface as a binary STL file to /home/ga/Documents/frontal_sinus.stl. The final model should only contain the frontal sinus cavities.
